hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | tr -d '\r' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.cs ]] && dotnet format "C:/Repos/mystic-forge/MysticForge.sln" --include "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | tr -d '\r' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '/Migrations/.*\.Designer\.cs$|ModelSnapshot\.cs$'; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"EF-generated migration file — use dotnet ef migrations add instead"}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
